expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: historical analogs become required-before-ship gates
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md and result.md explicitly cover the case focus and evaluate it: result.md states, "This benchmark checks phase5b checkpoint enforcement, specifically that historical analogs become required-before-ship gates" and cites the Phase 5b contract: "Historical analogs that remain relevant must be rendered as explicit [ANALOG-GATE] entries..." The output then assesses retrospective evidence that enforcement was missed (i18n/locale gate), concluding FAIL (blocking), which still demonstrates explicit case-focus coverage.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The output is centered on Phase 5b requirements and evidence: it quotes `review-rubric-phase5b.md` for required artifacts and `[ANALOG-GATE]` enforcement, and ties the failure to retrospective evidence explicitly labeled "Missed in Phase 5b" (BCIN-7289_QA_PLAN_CROSS_ANALYSIS.md). result.md includes a dedicated section "Phase alignment check (phase5b)" confirming Phase 5b alignment.
